name: ai-video-production-workspace
description: Governance-first AI video production workspace Beta for Jenn's local Windows environment.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:ui
scripts.webgpt:publisher:keygen: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/webgpt-cloud-publisher.js keygen
scripts.preflight:webgpt:publisher: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/webgpt-cloud-publisher.js preflight
scripts.publish:webgpt:snapshot: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/webgpt-cloud-publisher.js publish
scripts.media:preflight: npm run build:server && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -File scripts/windows/media-preflight.ps1
scripts.media:start: npm run build:server && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -File scripts/windows/media-start.ps1
scripts.auth:webgpt:bind-principal: npm run build:server && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -File scripts/windows/webgpt-bind-principal.ps1
scripts.test:v2: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/workbench-v2-*.test.js
scripts.test:v2:browser: npm run build && playwright test tests/browser/workbench-v2.spec.ts --config playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:h1: npm run build && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/h1-workbench.test.js
scripts.test:db: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/database-governance.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-authorization-admin.test.js dist/tests/director-artifact-import-receipt.test.js
scripts.test:selection-gate: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/test-selection-gate.test.js && node dist/scripts/test-selection-gate.js
scripts.test:foundation-boundaries: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/artifact-blob-boundary.test.js dist/tests/media-activation-integrity.test.js dist/tests/g0-pregen.test.js dist/tests/gpt-handoff-app.test.js dist/tests/m0-a-skeleton.test.js dist/tests/m0-b-media-artifacts.test.js dist/tests/m0-c-storyboard-package.test.js dist/tests/m0-d-generation.test.js dist/tests/m0-e-review-regeneration.test.js dist/tests/m0-f-assembly.test.js dist/tests/m0-r1-media-validity.test.js
scripts.test:provider-boundaries: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/m0-g-provider-boundary.test.js dist/tests/m1-0-external-image-transfer.test.js dist/tests/m1-provider-boundary.test.js dist/tests/provider-capability-contract.test.js dist/tests/provider-env-secret-safety.test.js
scripts.test:webgpt:legacy-boundaries: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/webgpt-draft-bridge.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-pending-actions.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-production-assistant.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-readonly-bridge.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-review-assistant.test.js
scripts.test:webgpt:eval: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-eval.test.js
scripts.test:webgpt:v4: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-auth.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-domain.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-media.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-metadata.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-oauth-discovery.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-server.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-eval.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-profile.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-selected-provider.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-context-budget.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-telemetry.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-v4-widget.test.js
scripts.test:webgpt:cloud: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/webgpt-cloud-projection.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-cloud-remote-runtime.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-cloud-delivery.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-media-remote-bridge.test.js
scripts.test:webgpt:app: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/webgpt-app-contract.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-apps-smoke.test.js
scripts.test:webgpt:director: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/director-domain-contract.test.js dist/tests/director-provider-quote-contract.test.js dist/tests/director-manual-native-tools.test.js dist/tests/director-local-bridge.test.js dist/tests/director-workbench-approval.test.js dist/tests/director-memory-port.test.js dist/tests/director-artifact-import-receipt.test.js
scripts.smoke:webgpt:media: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/webgpt-media-remote-bridge.test.js dist/tests/webgpt-apps-smoke.test.js
scripts.smoke:webgpt:app: npm run build:server && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/webgpt-apps-smoke.test.js
scripts.test:memory: npm run build && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/memory-saveback.test.js
scripts.test:source-audit: npm run build && node dist/scripts/run-isolated-tests.js dist/tests/source-audit.test.js
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:selection-gate && npm run test:foundation-boundaries && npm run test:provider-boundaries && npm run test:db && npm run test:v2 && npm run test:v2:ui && npm run test:h1 && npm run test:webgpt:legacy-boundaries && npm run test:webgpt:v4 && npm run test:webgpt:cloud && npm run test:webgpt:app && npm run test:webgpt:director && npm run test:webgpt:workspace && npm run test:webgpt:media-gateway && npm run smoke:webgpt:app && npm run smoke:webgpt:media && npm run test:memory && npm run test:source-audit && npm run test:legacy && npm run test:windows-runtime && npm run test:v2:browser && npm run secret:scan
